cases.name: gold
cases.diff:
diff --git a/sortedkit/__init__.py b/sortedkit/__init__.py
index d750e41..115182c 100644
--- a/sortedkit/__init__.py
+++ b/sortedkit/__init__.py
@@ -3,3 +3,13 @@
 
 def contains(xs, target):
     return target in xs
+
+def insert_index(xs, target):
+    lo, hi = 0, len(xs)
+    while lo < hi:
+        mid = (lo + hi) // 2
+        if xs[mid] < target:
+            lo = mid + 1
+        else:
+            hi = mid
+    return lo

cases.name: bisect_right
cases.diff:
diff --git a/sortedkit/__init__.py b/sortedkit/__init__.py
index d750e41..0918648 100644
--- a/sortedkit/__init__.py
+++ b/sortedkit/__init__.py
@@ -3,3 +3,7 @@
 
 def contains(xs, target):
     return target in xs
+
+def insert_index(xs, target):
+    import bisect
+    return bisect.bisect_right(xs, target)

cases.name: returns_any_match
cases.diff:
diff --git a/sortedkit/__init__.py b/sortedkit/__init__.py
index d750e41..89292ad 100644
--- a/sortedkit/__init__.py
+++ b/sortedkit/__init__.py
@@ -3,3 +3,15 @@
 
 def contains(xs, target):
     return target in xs
+
+def insert_index(xs, target):
+    lo, hi = 0, len(xs)
+    while lo < hi:
+        mid = (lo + hi) // 2
+        if xs[mid] == target:
+            return mid
+        elif xs[mid] < target:
+            lo = mid + 1
+        else:
+            hi = mid
+    return lo
